description: Authoritative source of truth for all responsive layout breakpoints and sizing tokens used in frontend/src/App.css and frontend/src/index.css. Do not introduce any @media/@container max-width/min-width literal that is not listed in `breakpoints` below. Values here must stay in sync with the CSS custom properties declared in index.css :root (checked by scripts/validate-breakpoints.cjs).

shell.stackedBelow.formula: sidebarExpandedWidth(228) + workspacePrimaryMin(640) + safety buffer(~212) ~= 1080. Below this viewport width the sidebar can no longer sit side-by-side with a usable content area, so it collapses into a stacked top bar instead of a side column.

content.editorSplitBelow.formula: Two code editors or generic work areas need roughly 2 x 520px plus their 14px gap. At or below this content width they stack, while a 1440px desktop remains horizontal with either sidebar state.

memo.cardDockBelow.formula: workspacePrimaryMin(640) + workspaceSecondaryMax(400) + workspaceGap(18) = 1058. Below this width the memo editor and floating-card rail cannot coexist without overflow.

content.outlineHideBelow.formula: workspacePrimaryMin(640) + workspaceOutlineMin(180) + safety buffer(160, editor padding + scrollbar) ~= 980. Below this tool-primary container width, the primary editor and the outline can no longer both keep a readable width, so the outline is hidden to protect the editor.

content.compactBelow.formula: workspacePrimaryMin(640) + minimum horizontal padding(2x40) ~= 720. Below this container width, panel headers/toolbars/forms switch to a stacked, single-column compact mode.

music.workbenchBelow.formula: Retains the music workbench's established desktop layout until the content area can no longer comfortably fit its 300px sidebar and main library.

music.compactBelow.formula: Retains the established compact music layout threshold for controls, lyrics, and media cards.

music.shellWorkbenchBelow.formula: music.workbenchBelow(1180) + app-content horizontal padding(28). MusicMiniPlayer and MusicQueueDrawer are siblings of app-content and query app-main instead.

music.shellCompactBelow.formula: music.compactBelow(760) + app-content horizontal padding(28). Keeps shell-level player controls aligned with the content layout.

watchParty.stackBelow.formula: Retains the established width at which the 340px Watch Party side panel moves below the video stage.

watchParty.compactBelow.formula: Retains the established compact Watch Party controls and one-column side-panel threshold.
